About Apex

Built for drivers who want the why, not just the bill

We photograph every inspection and send a written estimate before any work starts — so you decide with the full picture in front of you.

  • ✓
    You see what we see

    Photo-documented inspections, every time.

  • ✓
    No surprise upsells

    We fix what's broken and flag what's coming.

  • ✓
    Backed for 3 years

    36,000-mile nationwide warranty on the work.

Services

Everything your car needs, in one shop

⚙

Diagnostics & check-engine

Factory-level scan tools read the exact fault. We fix the cause once — no parts-cannon guessing, no repeat visits for the same light.

02
◐

Brakes

Pads, rotors & fluid — free check every visit.

03
◯

Tires & alignment

Mount, balance & laser alignment.

04
⬡

Oil & fluid service

Full-synthetic oil with a complimentary multi-point inspection on every visit.

05
⤬

Suspension

Struts, shocks & steering.

06
✦

Maintenance

Factory-interval service.

Why Apex

The difference you feel from the first call

✓

Transparent quotes

Written, photo-backed estimates before work begins. The quote is the price.

⚙

Dealer-grade tools

The same diagnostic platforms manufacturers use — accurate the first time.

⌂

Free loaner cars

On most longer repairs, so your day keeps moving while we work.

⛨

3-year warranty

36,000 miles, parts and labor, honored nationwide.

★

ASE-certified team

Master techs trained on hybrids, turbos and modern electronics.

↻

Zero upsells

We recommend only what's due. Nothing invented, ever.

How it works

Three steps to a fixed car

1

Book online

Pick a time and tell us the symptoms. Confirmation in seconds.

→
2

See the diagnosis

We inspect, photograph, and send a written estimate to approve.

→
3

Drive away covered

We fix it right and you leave with a 3-year warranty.

Team

FAQ

Questions, answered

Do you work on my make and model?+

Domestic, Asian, and most European makes — including hybrids and turbos. If we can't help, we'll point you to someone who can.

Will service void my factory warranty?+

No. Independent shops can perform scheduled maintenance without affecting your manufacturer warranty, and we document everything.

Do I get an estimate first?+

Always. You'll get a written, photo-backed estimate and we won't start until you approve it.

How long are most repairs?+

Many services are same-day. For longer jobs we offer free loaner cars so you're never stranded.

What does the warranty cover?+

3 years or 36,000 miles on parts and labor, honored nationwide through our service network.

What are your hours?+

We keep current hours posted live on our Google listing so they're always accurate.
